## Summary

<!-- Provide a brief description of the changes introduced by this pull request and their motivation. -->

## Type Of Change

Please select the options that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] UI/UX improvement (visual or interface-related changes)
- [ ] Documentation (updates or additions to documentation)
- [ ] Build/configuration (changes to build scripts, CI, or dependencies)
- [ ] Refactor (code simplification or structural optimization with no functional changes)
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Testing

Describe the steps you took to test these changes.

### Local Verification Checklist
- [ ] `npm run verify` (Linting, TypeScript compilation)
- [ ] `npm test` (Unit/integration tests)
- [ ] `npm run android:sync` (Capacitor sync)
- [ ] Android debug build checked if native/Android files changed

## Screenshots Or Recordings

<!-- If this PR contains visual or UI/UX changes, please include screenshots or screen recordings demonstrating the changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include private data, secrets, APKs, AABs, keystores, or local files.
- [ ] I did not bypass onboarding/security behavior.
- [ ] I did not add unrelated features.
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed.
